'''Natalie Darr''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel officer stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']], in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. During that time, she sent an e-mail to pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] confirming his transfer to the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

{{Char-stub}}
